foundation.theorem: one machine-checked self-proven theorem: there is no nothing
foundation.trace: One -> fold circle -> protected 24-lattice construction -> target-incapable peptide-geometry constitution -> sequence selector

causal_search.first_phi: canonical -180 degrees; enumerate the 24 psi states
causal_search.final_state: canonical state 0; final phi and psi are C-alpha inactive
causal_search.tie_break: ascending (dimensionless topology key, complete state tuple)
causal_search.stopping_rule: complete every C-alpha-active state; no target or score early stop

score.first: count non-neighbour C-alpha pairs closer than the chain's own mean adjacent C-alpha step
score.second: mean hydrophobic-pair squared distance / mean non-neighbour squared distance
score.third: radius-of-gyration squared / mean adjacent C-alpha squared step

component_routes.24_lattice: forward-forced from the protected target-assisted construction and retained as its exact finite state constitution
component_routes.peptide_geometry: named forward-forcing bridge in verify/protein_backbone_geometry_v1.json; byte-exact protected-witness replay required
component_routes.deterministic_nerf_builder: constitutional computational re-derivation in the target-incapable geometry module
component_routes.hydrophobic_alphabet: registered established sequence classification used by the forward-forcing selector
component_routes.beam_width: forced at runtime from the lattice axis census; caller selection is rejected
component_routes.neutral_secondary_structure: removed; v3 geometry receives sequence and exact dihedrals only
